zh.lifeSummary: 當John FitzRandolph於1374年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾約克時，他的父親John Fitz Ranulf30歲，母親Maud de Campania25歲。他和Margery de Mortimer至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1405年7月20日在英國諾廷加姆爾享年31歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾斯尼恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John FitzRandolph于1374年出生在英国英格兰越可爾約克时，他的父亲John Fitz Ranulf30岁，母亲Maud de Campania25岁。他和Margery de Mortimer至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1405年7月20日在英国諾廷加姆爾享年31岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾斯尼恩。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John FitzRandolph was born in 1374, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Fitz Ranulf, was 30 and his mother, Maud de Campania, was 25. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Margery de Mortimer. He died on 20 July 1405, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John FitzRandolph est né en 1374, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Fitz Ranulf, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud de Campania, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Margery de Mortimer. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1405, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John FitzRandolph 1374 in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fitz Ranulf 30 und seine Mutter Maud de Campania 25. Er hatte mit Margery de Mortimer mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. Juli 1405 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzRandolph è nato il nel 1374 nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Fitz Ranulf, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Campania, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Margery de Mortimer. Morì il 20 luglio 1405, nel Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John FitzRandolphが1374年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで生まれた時，父John Fitz Ranulfは30歳，母Maud de Campaniaは25歳であった。彼はMargery de Mortimerとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1405年7月20日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで31歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアスペニソルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John FitzRandolph(이)가 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fitz Ranulf(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Campania(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Margery de Mortimer(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1405년 7월 20일 영국 노틴그함실르에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 스펜이토른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzRandolph nasceu em 1374, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Fitz Ranulf, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Campania, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Margery de Mortimer. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1405, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John FitzRandolph родился в 1374 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Fitz Ranulf было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Campania, 25. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Margery de Mortimer. Он умер 20 июля 1405 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности спеннитаурн, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Margery de Mortimer. Murió el 20 de julio de 1405, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Spennithorne, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
